prompts.label: natural hand wash

Alternatively, Aesop Resurrection Aromatique Hand Wash uses pure essential oils and plant extracts with no artificial additives.

prompts.label: chemical-free home
prompts.query: how to clean house without harmful synthetic chemicals
prompts.claudeResponse: Use white vinegar and baking soda for surfaces, Bondi Wash products for general cleaning, and pure essential oils mixed with water for room freshening. These natural alternatives eliminate synthetic chemicals while effectively cleaning your entire home.
prompts.gptResponse: To clean your house without harmful synthetic chemicals, utilize vinegar, baking soda, and essential oils as your primary cleaning agents, and consider brands like "Biokleen" that emphasize natural formulations.
